# Glucarpidase 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Glucarpidase 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Glucarpidase</strong> 目前有 <strong>12 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Glucarpidase 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Voraxaze is indicated to reduce toxic plasma methotrexate concentration in adults and children (aged 28 days and older) with delayed methotrexate elimination or at risk of methotrexate toxicity.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>diabetic cataract（99.8%）</li>
<li>diabetic retinopathy（99.8%）</li>
<li>craniostenosis cataract（99.8%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus type 2 associated cataract（99.8%）</li>
<li>immature cataract（99.8%）</li>
<li>tetanic cataract（99.8%）</li>
<li>mature cataract（99.8%）</li>
<li>cortical cataract（99.8%）</li>
<li>nuclear senile cataract（99.8%）</li>
<li>senile cataract（99.8%）</li>
<li>severe nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy（99.8%）</li>
<li>hemorrhagic disease of newborn（98.9%）</li>
<li>microvascular complications of diabetes, susceptibility to（98.2%）</li>
<li>infiltrating bladder urothelial carcinoma（98.1%）</li>
<li>drug-induced osteoporosis（98.1%）</li>
<li>non-invasive bladder urothelial carcinoma（98.1%）</li>
<li>bladder signet ring cell adenocarcinoma（98.0%）</li>
<li>bladder mixed adenocarcinoma（98.0%）</li>
<li>bladder colonic type adenocarcinoma（98.0%）</li>
<li>bladder colloid adenocarcinoma（98.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/glucarpidase/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
